# Personality System

18-axis personality stored in 3 conceptual layers.

All axes are `f32` in `[0.0, 1.0]`. Values near 0 represent the low end (e.g. cowardly, reclusive) and values near 1 the high end (e.g. bold, sociable). Generated with a 2-sample average biasing toward 0.5.

## Core Drives (8)

| Axis | Range |
|------|-------|
| `boldness` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `sociability` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `curiosity` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `diligence` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `warmth` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `spirituality` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `ambition` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `patience` | 0.0 – 1.0 |

|------|-------|
| `anxiety` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `optimism` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `temper` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `stubbornness` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
| `playfulness` | 0.0 – 1.0 |
